data.body: R7 CLASSIFIER DESIGN (investigation, verified against §5.2 + live sidecars). Feasible: deterministic classifier hits 7/8 on a principled CORE cascade (8/8 only with an n=1 overfit rule, deliberately avoided). CRITICAL: separating signal is NOT in sidecar findings (sidecar-only=4/8); MISSED<->CAUGHT is carried by outcome-corpus post_claim_edit_class + review_round_count; sidecar supplies only MISSED<->UNKNOWABLE via a 'strong' predicate. CORE CASCADE (first-match), gated to tickets with had_persisted_review AND (post_claim_edit_class!=none OR rounds>=2): C1 cls==operator-attested-retag->CAUGHT; C2 rounds>=2->CAUGHT; C3 strong->UNKNOWABLE; C4 else->MISSED. strong := EXISTS surfaced finding decision in {block,advisory} AND priority>=0.5 (=RECALL_MIN_PRIORITY sidecar.py:299) AND severity in {critical,major}. rounds from git-walk outcome corpus (true count, not pruned sidecar). Simulated 8/8-minus-c8cc = 7/8 (c8cc substantive-unclassified misclassified MISSED; excluded n=1 rule). §5.2 rubric doc lines 139-155. adjudication_corpus has none of the 8. This honest framing (outcome-fields + sidecar strength predicate, NOT sidecar-findings-alone) IS R7's finding.
